creator: erik@tenku.dk
text:
Also, I completely agree - let us stick to C++14 for now.
I'm adding compilation against C++17, which implies inclusion of experimental ROOT version 7 code, to my todo list (which can be found at https://github.com/eamjensen/root-fbsd, by the way).
Some of the experimental features have already been reported to be out of development, and some users (myself included) would also appreciate the availability of these :-)
